examples: He drove his quadricycle, with more noise than speed, through the empty streets.
It can be registered as a quadricycle or motorcycle in some markets.
About the time Henry Ford built his first car, the quadricycle, in 1896, eccentric Japanese inventor Sakichi Toyoda, 29, invented his first--weaving loom.
Ford's first attempt at a genuine four-wheel vehicle, which he called the Quadricycle, used valves adapted from a steam engine and didn't have a reverse gear.
